price: Gebt volles Maß und gehört nicht zu denjenigen, die (anderen) Verlust verursachen.
arabic: ۞ أَوۡفُواْ ٱلۡكَيۡلَ وَلَا تَكُونُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡسِرِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: awfū al-kayla walā takūnū mina al-mukh'sirīna
